description: Non-exhaustive message-arm coverage (§51.0.S.2.4 / §51.0.S.4). GateMsg has {Toggle, Lock}; <Closed> declares an arm for .Toggle only, with no `| _ :>` wildcard. A state that declares ANY message-arm must cover every accepts= variant or carry a wildcard, so E-ENGINE-MSG-ARM-NOT-EXHAUSTIVE fires (sibling of E-MATCH-NOT-EXHAUSTIVE, the §34 error partition).
rationale: §51.0.S.2.4 a state declaring message-arms MUST cover every MsgType variant OR carry `| _ :>`; non-exhaustive -> E-ENGINE-MSG-ARM-NOT-EXHAUSTIVE.
